## Summary / 概要


## Type of Change / 変更種別

- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Prompt template
- [ ] Reflection template
- [ ] Example
- [ ] Safety or privacy wording

## Safety Checklist / 安全チェック

- [ ] This change does not diagnose, treat, prevent, or claim to cure any condition.
- [ ] This change does not provide medication, supplement, or treatment instructions.
- [ ] Any examples are clearly fictional or anonymized.
- [ ] The wording frames SelfTune as reflection, record keeping, or lifestyle review.
- [ ] Persistent, severe, sudden, or concerning symptoms are directed toward qualified professional support where relevant.
